task_completion.description: Navigate to the Nx Witness VMS Web Admin URL
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open with the address bar showing 'https://localhost:7001/static/index.html' (or a similar localhost:7001 path) and the Nx Witness interface is loading or visible.

task_completion.description: Log in to the Nx Witness VMS Web Admin
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dashboard or settings interface of the Nx Witness Web Admin is visible, indicating the agent has successfully bypassed the login screen.

task_completion.description: Access the system settings or administration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A settings menu, tab, or dialog is open, specifically showing system-level configurations (often labeled 'System Administration', 'Settings', or 'System Name').

task_completion.description: Input the new system name into the appropriate field
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text input field designated for the system name contains the exact text 'SecurityCentralVMS'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and ensure the new system name is visible in the web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is shown, or the updated system name 'SecurityCentralVMS' is visible in the main interface header, sidebar, or saved settings summary, confirming the change was successfully applied.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to make the change, not terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nx Witness UI in a web browser (like Chrome or Firefox), rather than a terminal window executing 'curl' or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness software
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches a standard web application interface with functional buttons, menus, and proper styling, not a local HTML file opened in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use backend database tools to bypass the web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible showing sqlite3 commands, database queries, or direct edits to Nx Witness configuration files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://localhost:7001/static/index.html. Credentials: admin / Admin1234!. Target new system name: SecurityCentralVMS. The task requires interacting with the actual Nx Witness VMS Web Admin interface to apply the name change.
